assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: businesses investing across Meta and Google Ads that need one coherent diagnostic view

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Teams can optimize toward whichever platform metric is easiest to see instead of the outcome the business actually values.
creative_strategy.message_angle: A shared conversion definition gives cross-platform analysis direction.
creative_strategy.hook: Choose the business outcome before reading the map.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A compass anchored to one approved outcome will communicate measurement alignment without suggesting perfect attribution.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: a precision compass surrounded by two abstract channel maps and one central business-outcome marker
visual_direction.action: the compass aligns to the outcome marker while the channel maps remain visibly different
visual_direction.environment: a dark cartography table with tactile paper, glass, and no geographic labels
visual_direction.composition: compass centered low, maps fan left and right, outcome marker upper-right, headline upper-left
visual_direction.lighting: lime compass needle, cyan and violet map edges, controlled warm outcome glow
visual_direction.style: premium cartographic editorial still life with analytical calm

copy.overlay_headline: Choose the business outcome before reading the map.
copy.caption: Cross-platform reporting becomes more useful when the primary conversion and business outcome are defined consistently before the numbers are compared.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is a precision compass surrounded by two abstract channel maps and one central business-outcome marker. Show the compass aligns to the outcome marker while the channel maps remain visibly different. Set the scene in a dark cartography table with tactile paper, glass, and no geographic labels. Composition: compass centered low, maps fan left and right, outcome marker upper-right, headline upper-left. Lighting: lime compass needle, cyan and violet map edges, controlled warm outcome glow. Visual style: premium cartographic editorial still life with analytical calm. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'A shared conversion definition gives cross-platform analysis direction.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Choose the business outcome before reading the map.', support line '$325 Meta + Google Ads Audit', and CTA 'Align your measurement' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid world maps, geographic targeting claims, platform logos, perfect-attribution promises or navigation-app visuals, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
world maps, geographic targeting claims, platform logos, perfect-attribution promises or navigation-app visuals

accessibility.alt_text: A compass aligns two different channel maps toward one business-outcome marker.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the $325 price and cross-platform scope against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
